body:
@toolbox-sdk/adk
Enumerations Protocol Enumeration Members MCP MCP: "2025-06-18"; MCP_v20241105 MCP_v20241105: "2024-11-05"; MCP_v20250326 MCP_v20250326: "2025-03-26"; MCP_v20250618 MCP_v20250618: "2025-06-18"; MCP_v20251125 MCP_v20251125: "2025-11-25"; Classes ToolboxClient An asynchronous client for interacting with a Toolbox service, specifically designed to work with the Google ADK.
This client mirrors the interface of the core ToolboxClient but returns ADK-compatible ToolboxTool instances that can be used directly in an ADK Agent.
Constructors Constructor new ToolboxClient( url, session?, clientHeaders?, protocol?): ToolboxClient; Initializes the ADK ToolboxClient.
Parameters Parameter Type Default value Description url string undefined The base URL for the Toolbox service API (e.g., “http://localhost:5000”). session? AxiosInstance | null undefined Optional Axios instance for making HTTP requests. If not provided, a new one will be created. clientHeaders? ClientHeadersConfig | null undefined Optional initial headers to be included in each request. protocol? Protocol Protocol.MCP - Returns ToolboxClient
Methods loadTool() loadTool( name, authTokenGetters?, boundParams?): Promise<ToolboxTool>; Asynchronously loads a tool from the server.
Retrieves the schema for the specified tool and returns an ADK-compatible ToolboxTool adapter instance, ready to be used in an ADK Agent.
Parameters Parameter Type Description name string The unique name or identifier of the tool to load. authTokenGetters? AuthTokenGetters | null Optional map of auth service names to token getters. boundParams? BoundParams | null Optional parameters to pre-bind to the tool. Returns Promise<ToolboxTool>
A promise that resolves to an ADK ToolboxTool, ready for execution.
loadToolset() loadToolset( name?, authTokenGetters?, boundParams?, strict?): Promise<ToolboxTool[]>; Asynchronously fetches a toolset and loads all tools defined within it.
Parameters Parameter Type Default value Description name? string undefined Name of the toolset to load. If null or undefined, loads the default toolset. authTokenGetters? AuthTokenGetters | null {} Optional map of auth service names to token getters. boundParams? BoundParams | null {} Optional parameters to pre-bind to the tools in the toolset. strict? boolean false If true, throws an error if any provided auth token or bound param is not used by at least one tool. Returns Promise<ToolboxTool[]>
A promise that resolves to a list of ADK ToolboxTool instances, ready for execution.
ToolboxTool An adapter class that wraps a CoreTool from the @toolbox-sdk/core to make it compatible with the @google/adk BaseTool interface.
Extends BaseTool Constructors Constructor new ToolboxTool(coreTool): ToolboxTool; Creates a new instance of the ADK-compatible tool wrapper.
Parameters Parameter Type Description coreTool ToolboxTool The original callable tool object from @toolbox-sdk/core. Returns ToolboxTool
Overrides BaseTool.constructor Properties [BASE_TOOL_SIGNATURE_SYMBOL] readonly [BASE_TOOL_SIGNATURE_SYMBOL]: true = true; A unique symbol to identify ADK base tool class.
Inherited from BaseTool.[BASE_TOOL_SIGNATURE_SYMBOL] description readonly description: string; Inherited from BaseTool.description isLongRunning readonly isLongRunning: boolean; Inherited from BaseTool.isLongRunning name readonly name: string; Inherited from BaseTool.name Accessors apiVariant Get Signature get apiVariant(): GoogleLLMVariant; The Google API LLM variant to use.
Returns GoogleLLMVariant
Inherited from BaseTool.apiVariant Methods _getDeclaration() _getDeclaration(): FunctionDeclaration | undefined; Generates the FunctionDeclaration (JSON Schema) for this tool by converting the Zod schema from the coreTool.
Returns FunctionDeclaration | undefined
A FunctionDeclaration for the LLM.
Overrides BaseTool._getDeclaration addAuthTokenGetter() addAuthTokenGetter(authSource, getIdToken): ToolboxTool; Creates a new ToolboxTool with an additional auth token getter.
Parameters Parameter Type Description authSource string The name of the auth source. getIdToken AuthTokenGetter The token getter function. Returns ToolboxTool
A new ToolboxTool instance.
addAuthTokenGetters() addAuthTokenGetters(newAuthTokenGetters): ToolboxTool; Creates a new ToolboxTool with additional auth token getters.
Parameters Parameter Type Description newAuthTokenGetters AuthTokenGetters A map of auth sources to token getters. Returns ToolboxTool
A new ToolboxTool instance.
bindParam() bindParam(paramName, paramValue): ToolboxTool; Creates a new ToolboxTool with a single bound parameter.
Parameters Parameter Type Description paramName string The name of the parameter to bind. paramValue unknown The value or getter to bind. Returns ToolboxTool
A new ToolboxTool instance.
bindParams() bindParams(paramsToBind): ToolboxTool; Creates a new ToolboxTool with bound parameters.
Parameters Parameter Type Description paramsToBind BoundParams A map of parameter names to values or getters. Returns ToolboxTool
A new ToolboxTool instance.
getCoreTool() getCoreTool(): ToolboxTool; Gets the underlying CoreTool object.
Returns ToolboxTool
The wrapped CoreTool instance.
processLlmRequest() processLlmRequest(request): Promise<void>; Processes the outgoing LLM request for this tool.
Use cases:
Most common use case is adding this tool to the LLM request. Some tools may just preprocess the LLM request before it’s sent out. Parameters Parameter Type Description request ToolProcessLlmRequest The request to process the LLM request. Returns Promise<void>
Inherited from BaseTool.processLlmRequest runAsync() runAsync(request): Promise<unknown>; Runs the tool by delegating the call to the wrapped coreTool.
Parameters Parameter Type Description request RunAsyncToolRequest The RunAsyncToolRequest from the ADK agent. Returns Promise<unknown>
A promise that resolves to the tool’s execution result.
Overrides BaseTool.runAsync
